# Spectrum Web Components

> Adobe's Spectrum 2 web component library (in active development). `swc-*` elements (Spectrum 2).

## Resources

- [Documentation](https://opensource.adobe.com/spectrum-web-components/second-gen): Full docs with live examples
- [GitHub](https://github.com/adobe/spectrum-web-components): Source code and issues
- [npm (@adobe/spectrum-wc)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@adobe/spectrum-wc): Package
- [llms-full.txt](https://opensource.adobe.com/spectrum-web-components/second-gen/llms-full.txt): All Spectrum 2 component APIs in one file
- [1st-gen llms.txt](https://opensource.adobe.com/spectrum-web-components/llms.txt): Spectrum 1 (sp-*) component index

## Learn about SWC

- [1st-gen vs 2nd-gen](https://opensource.adobe.com/spectrum-web-components/second-gen/?path=/docs/learn-about-swc-1st-gen-vs-2nd-gen--docs)
- [Overview](https://opensource.adobe.com/spectrum-web-components/second-gen/?path=/docs/learn-about-swc-overview--docs)
- [When to use SWC](https://opensource.adobe.com/spectrum-web-components/second-gen/?path=/docs/learn-about-swc-when-to-use-swc--docs)

- [Customization/Theme and Scales](https://opensource.adobe.com/spectrum-web-components/second-gen/?path=/docs/guides-customization-theme-and-scales--docs)

## Components

- [swc-asset](reference/swc-asset.md)
- [swc-badge](reference/swc-badge.md): A badge component that displays short, descriptive information about an element. Badges are typically used to indicate status, categories, or provide supplementary information.
- [swc-divider](reference/swc-divider.md)
- [swc-icon](reference/swc-icon.md): Minimal icon renderer that accepts slotted SVG markup.
- [swc-progress-circle](reference/swc-progress-circle.md): Progress circles show the progression of a system operation such as downloading, uploading, processing, etc. in a visual way.
- [swc-status-light](reference/swc-status-light.md): A status light is a great way to convey semantic meaning and the condition of an entity, such as statuses and categories.
